title: Tuning Into World Radio Day
story: Radio waves are buzzing with excitement on February 13 for World Radio Day! People around the globe celebrate by listening to their favorite radio stations, calling in to shows, and sharing memories of songs that made them dance. Radio DJs host special programs, play listener requests, and remind everyone how radio connects communities across continents. Some schools even create their own mini radio shows for the day, letting kids be the voices behind the microphone!
activity_question: What do some schools do to celebrate World Radio Day?
activity_choices: Create their own mini radio shows
Only listen to music from the 1950s
Turn off all radios for the day
activity_answer: Create their own mini radio shows
bonus_fact: Radio waves travel at the speed of light - 186,000 miles per second!

title: Twisted Pasta Paradise Day
story: Every February 13, pasta lovers celebrate National Tortellini Day by twirling forks full of these tiny, ring-shaped treasures! Restaurants serve special tortellini dishes, and families gather in kitchens to make fresh pasta from scratch. Some people stuff their tortellini with cheese, meat, or spinach, then swim them in creamy sauces or clear broths. Food bloggers share photos of their most colorful tortellini creations online.
activity_question: What do families often do together on National Tortellini Day?
activity_choices: Race to see who can eat fastest
bonus_fact: Tortellini are shaped like tiny belly buttons according to Italian legend!

title: Get a Different Name Day Adventures
story: February 13 is Get a Different Name Day, when people everywhere try on brand new names for 24 hours! Some kids pick superhero names like Thunder or Phoenix, while others choose funny ones like Pickle or Moonbeam. Teachers might become Professor Sparkles, and parents could go by Captain Awesome. People change their social media names, make new name tags, and ask friends to call them something totally different. It's like getting a mini makeover for your identity!
activity_question: What might someone do to celebrate Get a Different Name Day?
activity_choices: Make a new name tag with their chosen name
Only eat foods that start with their real name
Refuse to talk to anyone all day
activity_answer: Make a new name tag with their chosen name
follow_up_question: What different name would you choose for yourself and why?
